# introgression.GhostResult { #tspaint.introgression.GhostResult }

```python
tspaint.introgression.GhostResult(burden, tracts_by_sample)
```

Result of :func:`detect_ghost` — per-sample ghost tracts + genome-wide burden.

Mirrors :class:`tspaint.archaic.ArchaicResult`'s accessor vocabulary (``.burden`` dict,
``.tracts(sample)`` method) so the two detectors are used the same way.

## Attributes {.doc-section .doc-section-attributes}

<code>[**burden**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[dict](`dict`)\[[int](`int`), [float](`float`)\]]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Per sample, the fraction of the genome flagged ghost.

<code>[**tracts_by_sample**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[dict](`dict`)\[[int](`int`), [list](`list`)\[[tuple](`tuple`)\[[float](`float`), [float](`float`)\]\]\]]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Per sample, the merged ghost ``(left, right)`` tracts.

## Methods

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [tracts](#tspaint.introgression.GhostResult.tracts) | Ghost tracts ``[(left, right)]`` for one ``sample``. |

### tracts { #tspaint.introgression.GhostResult.tracts }

```python
tspaint.introgression.GhostResult.tracts(sample)
```

Ghost tracts ``[(left, right)]`` for one ``sample``.
